extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked solo on Passo di Ganda final climb, descended 19 hairpins alone, held off chasing Masnada by ~30 seconds into Bergamo
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacked final climb Passo di Ganda solo, maintained 30-second gap through technical 19-hairpin Selvino descent despite chasers.
MASNADA local knowledge allowed aggressive descent chase back to group then bridge to Pogačar, nearly closing 30s.
Chasers behind Pogačar-Masnada duo couldn't organize cooperation, allowing front two to stay clear final 5km despite small gap.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Won three monuments plus Tour in same season at 23, executed solo final-climb attacks like Tour de France pattern
rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: positive: Local Bergamo rider bridged back after being dropped on climb, descended fearlessly to nearly catch Pogačar
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Outsprinted Roglič for third, unexpected podium positioning suggests better form than expected
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: Early aggressive move on final climb days after first win in years, but lacked finishing power
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Off the pace on final climb, unable to follow elite group despite pre-race favorite status
